dashboard.noTransactions: No transactions yet. Tap + to add your first one!
dashboard.addFirstAccountDesc: Start by adding a cash wallet or bank account

sinkingFunds.title: True Expenses
sinkingFunds.noFundsDesc: Create sinking funds to save for big expenses

readyToAssign.title: Ready to Assign
readyToAssign.overAssigned: You've assigned more than you have!

tips.rule1Body: Assign every taka to a category before spending. Money without a job disappears.
tips.rule2Body: Big expenses aren't surprises. Save a little each month for Eid, school fees, and medical costs.
tips.rule3Body: Overspent on groceries? Move money from another category. Your budget is flexible.
tips.rule4Body: Congratulations! You're spending money earned over 30 days ago. Keep building that buffer.

rule1.title: Give Every Taka a Job
rule1.desc: When money comes in, assign every taka to a category. No taka sits idle.
rule1.example: Your salary of 30,000 comes in. Assign 8,000 to rent, 5,000 to groceries, 2,000 to transport... until 0 remains.

rule2.title: Embrace True Expenses
rule2.desc: Big, predictable expenses aren't surprises. Break them into monthly amounts.
rule2.example: Eid is in 4 months. Set aside 2,500/month now. When Eid arrives, the money is ready.

rule3.title: Roll with the Punches
rule3.desc: When you overspend, move money from another category. No guilt, just adjust.
rule3.example: Medical emergency costs 5,000 extra. Move from entertainment and shopping to cover it.

rule4.title: Age Your Money
rule4.desc: Spend money that's at least 30 days old. Break the paycheck-to-paycheck cycle.
rule4.example: February salary pays March bills. The older your money, the more breathing room you have.

onboarding.step3Desc: Pick a template that fits your life
onboarding.step4Desc: Assign your balance to categories. Every taka gets a job.
onboarding.step5Desc: Try adding your first expense. It only takes 3 taps!

templates.studentDesc: Tuition, books, transport, food, and fun
templates.professionalDesc: Rent, bills, groceries, savings, and dining
templates.freelancerDesc: Internet, software, taxes, equipment, and savings
templates.familyDesc: Rent, bills, groceries, education, medical, and more
